questions.question: What is the core philosophy of Agile Development?
options: A) Emphasis on following a predefined methodology
B) Emphasis on flexibility and rapid delivery
C) Emphasis on following a linear project plan
D) Emphasis on minimizing risk
questions.explanation: Agile Development is based on flexibility and rapid delivery, allowing for changes and adaptations throughout the project lifecycle.

questions.question: What is the main goal of Agile Development?
options: A) To deliver a perfect product on time
B) To deliver a high-quality product in short iterations
C) To minimize costs and maximize profits
D) To follow a predefined project plan
questions.explanation: The main goal of Agile Development is to deliver a high-quality product in short iterations, with continuous improvement and adaptation.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a key principle of Agile Development?
options: A) Individuals and interactions over processes and tools
B) Working software is the primary measure of progress
C) Customer satisfaction is the top priority
D) All of the above are key principles
questions.explanation: All of the above (Individuals and interactions over processes and tools, Working software is the primary measure of progress, Customer satisfaction is the top priority) are key principles of Agile Development.

questions.question: What is Scrum, a popular Agile framework?
options: A) A project management framework
B) A software development framework
C) A team structure framework
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: Scrum is a software development framework that emphasizes teamwork, accountability, and iterative progress toward well-defined goals.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of Agile Development?
options: A) Improved project schedules
B) Increased customer satisfaction
C) Reduced costs and improved quality
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: All of the above (Improved project schedules, Increased customer satisfaction, Reduced costs and improved quality) are benefits of Agile Development.
